name: aioffice-searchpro
description: AIOFFICE-SearchPro: adaptive public-page access for AI agents. Reads blocked public pages through public APIs, TLS impersonation, Jina, yt-dlp, and Playwright fallbacks without API keys.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive access to blocked public pages — no API keys, no proxy setup
interface.longDescription: AIOFFICE-SearchPro helps the agent read stubborn public content by escalating through public API readers, syndication gateways, TLS impersonation (curl_cffi), and a real headless browser until one route works. It stops honestly at login walls and paywalls.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this blocked article with the cheapest route first
Find what people are saying about a topic on Reddit or X
Get the captions and metadata from this YouTube video
